summary: Unsigned medication orders can be submitted
root_cause: Validation rule misconfiguration after workflow update
clinical_impact: Unsafe medication orders may proceed without physician sign-off
recommended_action: Restore blocking validation before the next release candidate

summary: Patient notes fail to save intermittently
clinical_impact: The patient chart may be missing recent clinical observations
recommended_action: Resolve timeout behavior and verify reliable note persistence

summary: Duplicate orders are created after a single submission
requirement: Orders must be submitted once per action
clinical_impact: Duplicate treatments or repeated clinical tasks may be performed
recommended_action: Implement idempotency handling and re-test order submission safeguards

summary: Incorrect CPT code mapping is applied
clinical_impact: Coding accuracy drops, increasing denial risk and revenue leakage
recommended_action: Refresh billing code mappings and validate claim output

summary: Known allergy alerts are not triggered
requirement: System must alert for known allergies
clinical_impact: Patients may receive medication despite a known allergy, creating life-threatening risk
recommended_action: Treat as release blocker and restore alerting before further rollout
